description: The Filters sidebar opens on the right side of the screen.
frame_description: The survey results page is visible with a new sidebar titled 'Filters' appearing on the right.

description: User clicks on the 'Select filter' dropdown menu in the Filters sidebar to open it.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Select filter' dropdown in the sidebar.

description: A dropdown menu with filter categories appears.
frame_description: A list of filter options like 'Participants', 'Age', 'Location' is now visible below the 'Select filter' box.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Completion date' option in the filter dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the 'Completion date' item in the open dropdown menu.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Participants' option in the filter dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor moves up and pauses over the 'Participants' item in the dropdown.

description: User scrolls down the survey results page.
frame_description: The content on the page moves upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: User clicks on the 'Select filter' dropdown menu again.
frame_description: The cursor is back on the 'Select filter' box in the sidebar.

description: The filter categories dropdown menu reappears.
frame_description: The list of filter categories is visible again.

description: User selects the 'Study blocks' category from the filter dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the 'Study blocks' item at the bottom of the dropdown.

description: A list of survey questions appears in the sidebar.
frame_description: The dropdown menu is replaced by a list of specific questions from the study.

description: User selects the question 'How important is it to you to be able to pool your Askable earnings before withdrawing?' from the list.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the first question in the list.

description: The sidebar updates to show filter configuration options for the selected question.
frame_description: The sidebar now shows 'Rating' and 'is greater than or equal to' fields.

description: User types '5' into the rating input field.
frame_description: The number '5' appears in the input box next to 'is greater than or equal to'.

description: User clicks the 'Apply filter' button.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Apply filter' button in the sidebar.

description: The survey results update to show only responses with a rating of 5.
frame_description: The chart on the main page refreshes, now showing a single bar for rating '5' at 100%.

description: User scrolls down to see the filtered individual responses.
frame_description: The page scrolls down to the 'Individual responses' section.

description: User hovers over the 'Locate your Askable wallet' task in the left sidebar, hesitating before clicking.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the second task item in the left-hand navigation menu for several seconds.

description: User clicks on the 'Locate your Askable wallet' task.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the task item in the left sidebar.

description: The page navigates to the analysis view for the 'Locate your Askable wallet' task.
frame_description: The URL in the address bar updates and the page content refreshes to show the new task's data.

description: User clicks the 'X' button to close the Filters sidebar.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the close icon at the top right of the Filters sidebar.

description: The Filters sidebar closes.
frame_description: The sidebar on the right disappears, and the main content expands.

description: User hovers over the 'Why do you think a reason...' task in the left sidebar.
interaction_target: Why do you think a reason... task
frame_description: The cursor pauses over another task item in the left sidebar.

description: User scrolls down the task analysis page.
frame_description: The page content moves up as the user scrolls down to see more paths.

description: User clicks on the 'Heat map' tab.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Heat map' option next to 'Recordings'.

description: The heat map visualization loads and appears on the screen.
frame_description: The screen recordings are replaced by a heat map overlay on the task screen.
